text: This week he met the "Judeo-Christian values" of the Western Christian world. This is the IDF, this is Judaism. I pray God exists only because I want to see Jews punished for their sin
text_zh: 本周他遇到了西方基督教世界的“犹太-基督教价值观”。这就是以色列国防军，这就是犹太教。我祈祷上帝存在，仅仅是因为我想看到犹太人为他们的罪行受到惩罚

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Al-Hadath: Lebanese residents who returned to their homes in southern Lebanon discovered several unpleasant “surprises” left behind by Hezbollah: communication devices, drone control equipment, weapons, and even the bodies of militants. According to the report, Hezbollah allegedly threatened residents not to speak about the group’s use of their homes, particularly in areas north of the Litani River. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Al-Hadath：回到黎巴嫩南部家中的黎巴嫩居民发现了真主党留下的几个令人不快的“惊喜”：通讯设备、无人机控制设备、武器，甚至是武装分子的尸体。据报道，真主党据称威胁居民不得谈论该组织使用他们房屋的情况，特别是在利塔尼河以北地区。 @wfwitness

text: As for the Christian area? There is about 5-7 Christian towns that the IDF didn't enter in that red zone. This is a figure of God for some, prophet for others in Qawzah town. He is a man/God worshiped or cherished by more than 3-4 billion monotheists. See him?
text_zh: 至于基督教地区？在那个红色区域内，大约有5-7个以色列国防军没有进入的基督教城镇。对于一些人来说，这是上帝的形象，对于考扎镇（Qawzah）的其他人来说，这是先知。他是一个被超过30-40亿一神论者崇拜或珍视的人/神。看到他了吗？

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Israel has established a "yellow line" in southern Lebanon, a no-go zone targeting anyone who approaches. Similar to measures in Gaza, the move risks further land seizures and systematic demolitions. – Al Jazeera 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 以色列在黎巴嫩南部设立了一条“黄线”，这是一个针对任何靠近者的禁区。类似于在加沙采取的措施，此举有导致进一步土地被占领和系统性拆除的风险。 – 半岛电视台 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: This is funny map The massively enlarged red part near Christophani ridge is a small IDF presence that came in an airlift from the Golan Heights and Syria. Mostly the latter They want to establish a permanent presence there like they did in Syria's Jabal al-Sheikh one day after the coward Bachar al-Assad ran away. As for the Litani area, they didn't cross the river and they neither control or have any presence in Yohmor and Beaufort ridge. These two they only want to depopulate to because anyone there can see the whole Israeli occupied areas and anyone there can see a lot of the south. No Israeli presence in Kounine either. Al-Tiri? Barely if none. Lots of empty lands and even more areas from the last war that were no man's land. Enjoy as it lasts...soon you will be forced to leave at orders of the orange clown or under fire
text_zh: 这张地图很有趣。克里斯托法尼（Christophani）山脊附近大幅扩大的红色部分是以色列国防军的一小部分存在，他们是从戈兰高地和叙利亚空运进来的。主要是后者。他们想在那里建立永久存在，就像他们在懦夫巴沙尔·阿萨德逃跑一天后在叙利亚谢赫山（Jabal al-Sheikh）所做的那样。至于利塔尼地区，他们没有越过河流，在尤赫莫尔（Yohmor）和博福特（Beaufort）山脊也没有控制权或任何存在。他们只想让这两个地方人口减少，因为那里的任何人都可以看到整个以色列占领区，那里的任何人都可以看到南部的大部分地区。库宁（Kounine）也没有以色列人存在。阿尔-蒂里（Al-Tiri）？几乎没有。有很多空地，甚至还有更多上次战争遗留下来的无人区。趁现在享受吧……很快你就会被迫在那个橙色小丑的命令下或在炮火下离开

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Israeli soldier vandalizes statue of Jesus Christ in Southern Lebanon 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部破坏耶稣基督雕像 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 Eight children killed in mass shooting in Louisiana, USA, police report. The incident occurred in the early hours of April 19. The victims ranged in age from one to 14 years old. According to law enforcement, the shooting stemmed from a domestic dispute. Among the victims were relatives of the suspect. After the attack, the suspect carjacked a vehicle and attempted to flee, but was shot and killed during a police chase. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 据警方报告，美国路易斯安那州发生大规模枪击事件，造成八名儿童死亡。事件发生在4月19日凌晨。受害者年龄在1岁至14岁之间。据执法部门称，枪击事件源于家庭纠纷。受害者中包括嫌疑人的亲属。袭击发生后，嫌疑人劫持了一辆汽车并试图逃跑，但在随后的警察追捕中被击毙。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🇱🇾 A column of Russia's "African Corps" spotted somewhere in eastern Libya. The convoy includes Ural-63704 Tornado-U and KamAZ-53949 Typhoon-K vehicles. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇱🇾 一支俄罗斯“非洲军团”的车队在利比亚东部某处被发现。车队包括乌拉尔-63704 Tornado-U和卡马斯-53949 Typhoon-K车辆。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Eight children were killed in a domestic shooting incident in Shreveport, Louisiana, this Sunday morning. Authorities believe that some the victims were relatives of the shooter, who is now confirmed dead. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 本周日早上，路易斯安那州什里夫波特发生一起家庭枪击事件，造成八名儿童死亡。当局认为部分受害者是枪手的亲属，枪手目前已被证实死亡。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Fars News Agency reports that CNN claims an Iranian delegation – possibly including Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf – may travel to Islamabad on Tuesday. The report also suggests that, if negotiations advance, Masoud Pezeshkian and Donald Trump could attend in person. However, sources inside Iran say no final decision has been made, and the overall outlook remains negative . They add that as long as the U.S. naval blockade continues, Iran will not consider a second round of talks in Islamabad. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 法尔斯通讯社报道称，CNN声称伊朗代表团（可能包括阿巴斯·阿拉格希和穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫）可能会在周二前往伊斯兰堡。报道还暗示，如果谈判取得进展，马苏德·佩泽希齐扬和唐纳德·特朗普可能会亲自出席。然而，伊朗内部消息人士称尚未做出最终决定，总体前景依然负面。他们补充说，只要美国的海上封锁继续，伊朗就不会考虑在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮会谈。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 IRNA: Reports circulating about a second round of negotiations in Islamabad are false. US overreach, unreasonable and unrealistic demands, repeated position shifts, constant contradictions, continued so-called naval blockade — which itself constitutes a violation of the ceasefire understanding — and ongoing threatening rhetoric have all blocked any progress in negotiations. Under these conditions, no clear prospect for productive talks is in sight. The reports being pushed by the US are a media game, part of a deliberate "blame game" strategy aimed at pressuring Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：关于在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮谈判的报道是不实的。美国的越权行为、不合理且不切实际的要求、反复无常的立场、持续的矛盾、持续的所谓海上封锁（其本身就构成了对停火谅解的违反）以及持续的威胁性言论，都阻碍了谈判的任何进展。在这种情况下，看不到任何富有成效的会谈前景。美国推动的这些报道是一场媒体游戏，是旨在向伊朗施压的蓄意“指责游戏”策略的一部分。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Over 250 terrorists eliminated, 405+ terrorist infrastructure sites dismantled, and more than 1,000 weapons and munitions located in the Forward Defense Area. Troops also located underground tunnel routes in the area. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045915743980581179/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报以色列国防军：在前方防御区消灭了超过250名恐怖分子，拆除了405个以上的恐怖分子基础设施点，并定位了1000多件武器和弹药。部队还在该地区发现了地下隧道路线。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045915743980581179/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Belarusian President Lukashenko says he's willing to meet Trump once a "big deal" has been prepared, adding that Minsk has adapted to Western sanctions and any agreement should go beyond relief. - Reuters https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045915471002673641/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报白俄罗斯总统卢卡申科表示，一旦准备好“大交易”，他愿意与特朗普会面，并补充说明斯克已经适应了西方的制裁，任何协议都应超越救济。 - 路透社 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045915471002673641/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan: Iran‑US talks are reaching a decisive stage, but sources say communication difficulties with Iran’s new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, may be behind Tehran’s erratic behaviour: the IRGC is pushing a confrontational line, while Foreign Minister Araghchi strikes a more peaceful tone. A Middle East source expressed optimism about extending the ceasefire. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu will hold a limited security consultation this evening, and the cabinet is set to convene tomorrow afternoon. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：伊美会谈正进入决定性阶段，但消息人士称，与伊朗新任最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的沟通困难可能是德黑兰反复无常行为背后的原因：伊斯兰革命卫队正在推行对抗路线，而外交部长阿拉格希则表现出更温和的基调。一位中东消息人士对延长停火表示乐观。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡今晚将举行有限的安全磋商，内阁定于明天下午召开会议。 推文

text: Faytuks News No tankers have crossed the Strait of Hormuz today, according to tracking data -CNN tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 据追踪数据显示，今天没有油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡 - CNN 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: The Israeli security cabinet is convening this evening as rhetoric escalates between Iran and the United States. A full cabinet meeting is scheduled for tomorrow afternoon. Israel assesses that U.S. President Trump wants a deal; if no agreement is reached in Pakistan, the ceasefire will likely be extended for further talks. However, preparations are under way for a possible renewal of hostilities. A senior Israeli official said: “We cannot say for certain where things are heading. If you put the president’s statements into ChatGPT, the chat would crash. As before, Trump wants negotiations, but Iran’s hardline position could lead to a resumption of fighting.” Trump warned today that if Iran does not take the deal, the U.S. will bomb every power plant and bridge in Iran. Israel is drawing up a list of targets should fighting resume, though officials stress these are not necessarily infrastructure targets. The transition from ceasefire to renewed fighting could be very fast, and all relevant systems are preparing. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：随着伊朗和美国之间的言论升级，以色列安全内阁将于今晚召开会议。全体内阁会议定于明天下午举行。以色列评估认为美国总统特朗普想要达成协议；如果巴基斯坦的谈判未能达成协议，停火可能会延长以进行进一步会谈。然而，各方正在为可能恢复的敌对行动做准备。一位以色列高级官员表示：“我们无法确定事态将走向何方。如果你把总统的声明输入ChatGPT，聊天程序会崩溃。和以前一样，特朗普想要谈判，但伊朗的强硬立场可能导致战斗恢复。”特朗普今天警告说，如果伊朗不接受协议，美国将轰炸伊朗的每一个发电厂和桥梁。如果战斗恢复，以色列正在制定一份目标清单，尽管官员们强调这些不一定是基础设施目标。从停火到恢复战斗的过渡可能非常快，所有相关系统都在准备中。 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Al Jazeera: Head of the National Security Committee of the Iranian Parliament Ebrahim Azizi says that Iran will only accept proposals in negotiations that are of national interest. He also emphasized that negotiations in Pakistan must yield tangible results and that the negotiation team won’t accept any demands imposed on them. He concluded by urging the U.S. to accept the new system for the Strait of Hormuz and noting that there has been no change in Iran’s position regarding matters of national interest. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 半岛电视台：伊朗议会国家安全委员会主席易卜拉欣·阿齐兹表示，伊朗只会接受符合国家利益的谈判提议。他还强调，在巴基斯坦的谈判必须产生切实的成果，谈判小组不会接受强加给他们的任何要求。他最后敦促美国接受霍尔木兹海峡的新制度，并指出伊朗在国家利益问题上的立场没有改变。 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israeli Channel 12: The framework discussed between Iran and the United States in recent days reportedly includes: A cessation of uranium enrichment for 15 years. Conversion of enriched uranium into reactor fuel, full IAEA oversight of nuclear sites. The opening of the Strait of Hormuz, an end to the war and withdrawal of American forces, and the removal of economic sanctions. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 以色列第12频道：据报道，伊朗和美国近几天讨论的框架包括：停止铀浓缩15年。将浓缩铀转化为反应堆燃料，国际原子能机构对核设施进行全面监督。开放霍尔木兹海峡，结束战争并撤出美军，以及取消经济制裁。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian source to Al Jazeera says Tehran sees a gap between Trump’s claims and reality, warning the U.S. is engaging in “deception” and that a new escalation may be imminent. Via @KimberlyHalkett tweet
text_zh: 开源情报伊朗消息人士告诉半岛电视台，德黑兰认为特朗普的说法与现实之间存在差距，警告美国正在进行“欺骗”，新的升级可能迫在眉睫。通过 @KimberlyHalkett 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 BREAKING | IRNA: Iran has denied reports of a second round of negotiations in Islamabad. State media said U.S. excessive demands, unreasonable and unrealistic positions, constant contradictions, the ongoing naval blockade (which violates the ceasefire understanding), and threatening rhetoric have so far prevented progress. “In these circumstances, no clear outlook for productive talks is conceivable,” the report added, describing the U.S. announcements as a media game and a “blame game” to pressure Iran. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 快讯 | IRNA：伊朗否认了关于在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮谈判的报道。官方媒体称，美国的过分要求、不合理和不切实际的立场、持续的矛盾、持续的海上封锁（违反了停火谅解）以及威胁性言论，迄今为止阻碍了进展。“在这种情况下，无法想象富有成效的会谈有明确的前景，”报道补充说，并将美国的声明描述为媒体游戏和向伊朗施压的“指责游戏”。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRAN’S IRNA: Iran rejected participating in a second round of talks with the U.S. Always games. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报伊朗IRNA：伊朗拒绝参加与美国的第二轮会谈。总是玩弄手段。 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 An Iranian team will arrive in Islamabad, Pakistan, on Tuesday, according to CNN, citing Iranian sources. ➡️ Meanwhile, Iran's state media continues to report that no delegations will be sent to Islamabad as long as the U.S. naval blockade is in effect. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 据CNN援引伊朗消息人士的话称，伊朗代表团将于周二抵达巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡。➡️ 与此同时，伊朗官方媒体继续报道称，只要美国的海上封锁仍然有效，就不会派遣任何代表团前往伊斯兰堡。 推文

text: Faytuks News Iranian source tells Al Jazeera: "We believe we're facing a deception by the enemy & we’re on the verge of a new round of escalation" tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 伊朗消息人士告诉半岛电视台：“我们认为我们正面临敌人的欺骗，我们正处于新一轮升级的边缘” 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF Spokesperson (Arabic): Seized Hezbollah documents from southern Lebanon reveal the group photographs young Shia recruits in "martyrdom" clothing while they're still alive, preparing death announcements before sending them to battle. "Hezbollah trades in the death of your sons. They prepare the obituary before sending the young man to fight, because they know exactly they are sending him to his death." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报以色列国防军发言人（阿拉伯语）：从黎巴嫩南部缴获的真主党文件显示，该组织在年轻的什叶派新兵还活着时就给他们拍摄身穿“殉道”服装的照片，并在送他们上战场前准备好死亡公告。“真主党在贩卖你们儿子的死亡。他们在送年轻人去战斗之前就准备好了讣告，因为他们非常清楚自己是在送他去死。” 推文

text: U.S. Central Command Sailors aboard USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) stand watch in the Arabian Sea as U.S. forces enforce the blockade of Iranian ports and costal areas. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045908727136436533/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（CVN 72）上的水手们在阿拉伯海值勤，美军正在执行对伊朗港口和沿海地区的封锁。 https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045908727136436533/photo/1 推文

text: Canadian PM Mark Carney: Many of our former strengths, based on our close ties to America, have become our weaknesses.
text_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼：我们许多基于与美国密切关系的前优势，已经变成了我们的弱点。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 IRNA Exclusive: Second Round of Islamabad Talks Denied 🔹 Reports of a second round of negotiations in Islamabad are false. U.S. demands, shifting positions, and continued “naval blockade” actions have stalled progress, leaving little hope for successful talks. 🔹 The reports are described as part of a U.S. media “blame game” to pressure Iran. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 IRNA独家：否认伊斯兰堡第二轮会谈 🔹 关于在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮谈判的报道是不实的。美国的要求、不断变化的立场以及持续的“海上封锁”行动阻碍了进展，使成功会谈的希望渺茫。 🔹 这些报道被描述为美国媒体向伊朗施压的“指责游戏”的一部分。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: The Israeli security cabinet is convening this evening as rhetoric escalates between Iran and the United States. A full cabinet meeting is scheduled for tomorrow afternoon. Israel assesses that U.S. President Trump wants a deal;…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israeli Channel 12: The framework discussed between Iran and the United States in recent days reportedly includes: A cessation of uranium enrichment for 15 years. Conversion of enriched uranium into reactor fuel, full IAEA oversight of nuclear sites. The opening of the Strait of Hormuz, an end to the war and withdrawal of American forces, and the removal of economic sanctions. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Al Jazeera: Head of the National Security Committee of the Iranian Parliament Ebrahim Azizi says that Iran will only accept proposals in negotiations that are of national interest. He also emphasized that negotiations in Pakistan must yield tangible results and that the negotiation team won’t accept any demands imposed on them. He concluded by urging the U.S. to accept the new system for the Strait of Hormuz and noting that there has been no change in Iran’s position regarding matters of national interest. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 半岛电视台：伊朗议会国家安全委员会主席易卜拉欣·阿齐兹表示，伊朗只会接受符合国家利益的谈判提议。他还强调，在巴基斯坦的谈判必须产生切实的成果，谈判小组不会接受强加给他们的任何要求。他最后敦促美国接受霍尔木兹海峡的新制度，并指出伊朗在国家利益问题上的立场没有改变。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Kan: Iran‑US talks are reaching a decisive stage, but sources say communication difficulties with Iran’s new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, may be behind Tehran’s erratic behaviour: the IRGC is pushing a confrontational line, while Foreign Minister…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: The Israeli security cabinet is convening this evening as rhetoric escalates between Iran and the United States. A full cabinet meeting is scheduled for tomorrow afternoon. Israel assesses that U.S. President Trump wants a deal; if no agreement is reached in Pakistan, the ceasefire will likely be extended for further talks. However, preparations are under way for a possible renewal of hostilities. A senior Israeli official said: “We cannot say for certain where things are heading. If you put the president’s statements into ChatGPT, the chat would crash. As before, Trump wants negotiations, but Iran’s hardline position could lead to a resumption of fighting.” Trump warned today that if Iran does not take the deal, the U.S. will bomb every power plant and bridge in Iran. Israel is drawing up a list of targets should fighting resume, though officials stress these are not necessarily infrastructure targets. The transition from ceasefire to renewed fighting could be very fast, and all relevant systems are preparing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Kan：伊美会谈正进入决定性阶段，但消息人士称，与伊朗新任最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的沟通困难可能是德黑兰反复无常行为背后的原因：伊斯兰革命卫队正在推行对抗路线，而外交部长……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：随着伊朗和美国之间的言论升级，以色列安全内阁将于今晚召开会议。全体内阁会议定于明天下午举行。以色列评估认为美国总统特朗普想要达成协议；如果巴基斯坦的谈判未能达成协议，停火可能会延长以进行进一步会谈。然而，各方正在为可能恢复的敌对行动做准备。一位以色列高级官员表示：“我们无法确定事态将走向何方。如果你把总统的声明输入ChatGPT，聊天程序会崩溃。和以前一样，特朗普想要谈判，但伊朗的强硬立场可能导致战斗恢复。”特朗普今天警告说，如果伊朗不接受协议，美国将轰炸伊朗的每一个发电厂和桥梁。如果战斗恢复，以色列正在制定一份目标清单，尽管官员们强调这些不一定是基础设施目标。从停火到恢复战斗的过渡可能非常快，所有相关系统都在准备中。 @wfwitness

text: Iranian source to Al Jazeera: In light of Trump’s statements about holding negotiations and inconsistency with what is actually happening between Iran and the United States, we believe we’re facing a deception by the enemy and we’re on the verge of a new round of escalation.
text_zh: 伊朗消息人士向半岛电视台表示：鉴于特朗普关于举行谈判的声明与伊朗和美国之间实际发生的情况不符，我们认为我们正面临敌人的欺骗，并且正处于新一轮升级的边缘。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Trump stated that he feels good about a potential deal with Iran. “The concept of the deal is already closed. I think we have a very good chance of completing it,” he said. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan: Iran‑US talks are reaching a decisive stage, but sources say communication difficulties with Iran’s new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, may be behind Tehran’s erratic behaviour: the IRGC is pushing a confrontational line, while Foreign Minister Araghchi strikes a more peaceful tone. A Middle East source expressed optimism about extending the ceasefire. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu will hold a limited security consultation this evening, and the cabinet is set to convene tomorrow afternoon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：美国总统特朗普表示，他对与伊朗达成潜在协议感到乐观。他说：‘协议的概念已经敲定。我认为我们有很大的机会完成它。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：伊美会谈正进入决定性阶段，但有消息称，与伊朗新任最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的沟通困难可能是德黑兰行为反复无常的原因：伊斯兰革命卫队正在推动对抗路线，而外交部长阿拉格希则采取了更温和的基调。一位中东消息人士对延长停火表示乐观。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡今晚将举行有限的安全磋商，内阁定于明天下午开会。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Trump stated that he feels good about a potential deal with Iran. “The concept of the deal is already closed. I think we have a very good chance of completing it,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：美国总统特朗普表示，他对与伊朗达成潜在协议感到乐观。他说：‘协议的概念已经敲定。我认为我们有很大的机会完成它。’ @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇦🇷 ⚡️ War Criminal Netanyahu: “Any moment could bring new developments” – Bibi hints at major shifts during Milei visit 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇦🇷 ⚡️ 战犯内塔尼亚胡：“任何时刻都可能带来新的进展”——比比在米莱访问期间暗示会有重大转变 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Sources to MTV on the upcoming negotiations and ceasefire with Lebanon and Israel: The second preparatory meeting between Lebanon and israel will be held next Tuesday or Wednesday, during which the date and location of direct negotiations will be agreed upon. The extension of the ceasefire between Lebanon and israel will be raised during the preliminary meeting at a preliminary American request, and the extension options range from ten days to one month. The initial structure of the Lebanese negotiating delegation includes Simon Karam, an assisting civilian figure, and a specialized military figure. This structure is subject to change depending on the composition of the israeli delegation. The visit of the President of the Lebanese Republic to the United States in the coming days is an idea under consideration, but the issue of a meeting with Netanyahu is difficult and still not mature. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 消息人士向 MTV 透露关于黎巴嫩与以色列即将进行的谈判和停火的消息：黎巴嫩与以色列之间的第二次筹备会议将于下周二或周三举行，届时将商定直接谈判的日期和地点。在美方的初步要求下，黎以停火延期问题将在预备会议上提出，延期选项从十天到一个月不等。黎巴嫩谈判代表团的初步结构包括辅助文职人员西蒙·卡拉姆和一名专业军事人员。该结构可能会根据以色列代表团的组成而有所变动。黎巴嫩共和国总统在未来几天访问美国的想法正在考虑之中，但与内塔尼亚胡会面的问题很困难，目前尚不成熟。 @wfwitness

text: 📸 Israeli Merkava tank in the ruins of Bint Jbeil (southern Lebanon). The town is being rapidly destroyed by Israel.
text_zh: 📸 以色列梅卡瓦坦克在宾特朱拜勒（黎巴嫩南部）的废墟中。该镇正被以色列迅速摧毁。

text: Open Source Intel 600-700 square KM taken from Hezbollah and they still agreed to a ceasefire. Unprecedented. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045904317589160225/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：从真主党手中夺取了600-700平方公里的土地，他们竟然还同意停火。史无前例。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045904317589160225/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ghalibaf says Iran is holding the line on key demands, insisting Hezbollah must be part of any broader deal and that unresolved violations tied to the group cannot be ignored. He added that Tehran will not move forward unless frozen Iranian assets are released, framing both issues as preconditions for any further negotiations. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：卡利巴夫表示，伊朗在关键要求上坚持立场，坚称真主党必须成为任何更广泛协议的一部分，且与该组织相关的未决违规行为不能被忽视。他补充说，除非解冻伊朗资产，否则德黑兰不会推进谈判，并将这两个问题作为进一步谈判的前提条件。推文

text: Open Source Intel Syria released footage showing the arrest of a Hezbollah-linked terror cell. Several rockets and launchers were seized. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045903625801658738/video/1 Jolani’s security forces capturing a Hezbollah cell in Syria preparing to launch rockets toward Israel A sight to be seen. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045896120585400441/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：叙利亚发布了逮捕一个与真主党有关的恐怖小组的视频。缴获了多枚火箭弹和发射器。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045903625801658738/video/1 朱拉尼的安全部队在叙利亚抓获了一个准备向以色列发射火箭弹的真主党小组，场面壮观。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045896120585400441/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel UAEs Anwar Gargash: ״It is not possible to return to the previous pace in relations with Iran without a review, candor, and guarantees.״ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045901872976756934/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：阿联酋的安瓦尔·加尔加什：“如果不进行审查、坦诚沟通并提供保证，就不可能恢复与伊朗关系的先前节奏。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045901872976756934/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli explosions in the town of Taybeh, southern Lebanon. The town is indeed in the yellow line which the IDF is operating in. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列在黎巴嫩南部泰贝镇（Taybeh）进行爆炸。该镇确实位于以色列国防军（IDF）正在行动的黄线区域内。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 Hezbollah has released a statement rejecting the accusations issued by the Syrian ministry of interior regarding an alleged cell aiming to launch missiles and destabilize Syria. @wfwitmess
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 真主党发表声明，驳斥了叙利亚内政部关于所谓旨在发射导弹和破坏叙利亚稳定的团伙的指控。 @wfwitmess

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 IRNA: Iran has denied reports of a second round of negotiations in Islamabad. State media said U.S. excessive demands, unreasonable and unrealistic positions, constant contradictions, the ongoing naval blockade (which violates the ceasefire understanding), and threatening rhetoric have so far prevented progress. “In these circumstances, no clear outlook for productive talks is conceivable,” the report added, describing the U.S. announcements as a media game and a “blame game” to pressure Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：伊朗否认了关于在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮谈判的报道。官方媒体称，美国的过分要求、不合理和不切实际的立场、持续的矛盾、正在进行的海上封锁（违反了停火谅解）以及威胁性言论，迄今为止阻碍了进展。报告补充说：“在这种情况下，无法设想富有成效的谈判有任何明确的前景”，并将美国的声明描述为媒体游戏和向伊朗施压的“指责游戏”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Footage documents an Israeli soldier smashing the head of a statue of Jesus Christ in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 视频记录了一名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸碎了一尊耶稣基督雕像的头部。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army announced that they removed an earthen barrier that had been placed by the Israeli army on the al-Mari - Ain Arab road, and continues the rehabilitation works of the Tayr Falsiyeh bridge which was struck during the war. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Litani authority announces the beginning of construction work of 2 new bridges and rehabilitation works with the Lebanese army. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队宣布，他们移除了以色列军队在 al-Mari - Ain Arab 公路上设置的土障，并继续对在战争期间被击中的 Tayr Falsiyeh 桥进行修复工作。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 利塔尼（Litani）管理局宣布开始与黎巴嫩军队合作进行两座新桥梁的建设和修复工作。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army announced that they removed an earthen barrier that had been placed by the Israeli army on the al-Mari - Ain Arab road, and continues the rehabilitation works of the Tayr Falsiyeh bridge which was struck during the war. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队宣布，他们移除了以色列军队在 al-Mari - Ain Arab 公路上设置的土障，并继续对在战争期间被击中的 Tayr Falsiyeh 桥进行修复工作。 @wfwitness

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列国防军继续在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）各地拆除房屋，该地区传出多次爆炸声。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列无人机正在黎巴嫩南部东部地区上空低空飞行。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF continues to demolish homes across Bint Jbeil with multiple explosions heard from the area. @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 The Empire Strikes Back! ... a pathetic Lego counter-dis punch - with the AmeriKKKans using their own war crimes as glorious proof of them actually winning. 🐻 There's pathetic, there's dumb, there's idiotic - and then there's the US. They really do be this out of touch. Simply sad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 帝国反击战！……一场可悲的乐高式反击——美国人利用他们自己的战争罪行作为他们实际上正在获胜的光荣证据。🐻 有一种可悲，有一种愚蠢，有一种白痴——然后就是美国。他们真的如此脱离现实。简直可悲。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix RT @WeaponScientist : On the contrary, JDAM or SDB debris at the site of mass casualty events in Gaza and Lebanon is the opposite of good branding. The first and strongest opposition to this type of cheap and populist talk will come from the US defense industry. Israel is the best and cheapest marketing tool for US weapons. Worth trillions in sales and brand recognition. - Jonathan Conricus tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @WeaponScientist：相反，在加沙和黎巴嫩的大规模伤亡现场发现的 JDAM 或 SDB 碎片与良好的品牌形象恰恰相反。对这种廉价和民粹主义言论的第一次也是最强烈的反对将来自美国国防工业。以色列是美国武器最好、最便宜的营销工具。价值数万亿美元的销售额和品牌知名度。—— Jonathan Conricus 推文
